dialogos.texto_en: Phew, we finally made it.\nOcean Expo Park is unexpectedly far, huh?
I wonder if everyone else is coming too?\nOr are they going somewhere else?
Well, I haven't asked them about their plans.\nEither way, it's just the two of us today.
Th-that's right.
(Aagh, Futaro, you're so sneaky!\n Acting all normal like that!\n I wasn't prepared for this happening so suddenly, you know?!)
(Just when did those girls team up with Futaro?\n Ichika didn't say anything last night!)
Hey, Futaro?\nIt's nice to be alone with you,\nbut what's the sudden rush about?
Well, you told me to be aggressive, didn't you.
Huh...?
I've been taking your advances only during this trip,\nhaven't I? I'll make up for it, or rather,\ntry harder...is what I mean.
O-oh, so that's how it is.
I see then.\nI'm looking forward to seeing you\non how you'll take the initiative.
Leave it to me.\nI'll give you a day you can't forget.
(Oh no! My heart can't take it\n with Futaro being like this!\n He looked even cooler than usual when he invited me!)
(I really...)
Nino?
Ah, it's nothing!
So, where should we go from here?\nThere are various facilities gathered here,\nright?
Yeah, I have a few places in mind.
I think the highlight is Churaumi Aquarium.\nLet's save that for last\nand check out the other facilities first.
I'll guide you, so follow me.
O-okay!
